rationale: Faithful AS-IS implementation of frozen v12 Task 4a only (no reinterpretation, no scope expansion into 4b/5). inventory.mjs commits exact sorted PACKAGE_ROOTS, DOC_ROOTS + DOC_WEAVER_EXCLUDE/GLOBAL_EXCLUDE (docs/runs + self-weave), sorted CONTRACT_FILES (D31), five weaver ids + integer versions, REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS exactly equal to the normative table (proven by unit), LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS exactly the D32 mapping (keys {module,node:module}, values ["builtinModules","isBuiltin"], deep-frozen outer+inners, deep-equal + mutation-failure units). Per D17/AM-17 only git+code WEAVER_IMPL_FILES (existing files equal to shared-classifier/resolver closures) are committed; no nonexistent names. util.mjs exports the single D33 classifier+relative resolver (shared by closure derivation and proven by AM-34 test 19 for both consumers; no competing definitions or extension-append), dependency-free lexer + Phase-1 export scanner (exactly the four forms), real-file walker (rejects escape/symlinks, POSIX-sorted), D26/D29 counted-iterator (count only on completed consumption; accounting solely via driver-held accessor; partial/exhaustion/cardinality units), D21 physical-containment (lstat every component, reject symlink, never follow), and exact no-shell git allowlist. test-closure derives with the shared pair and proves inventories == closures (never trusted) for every accepted form via form-only fixtures + recursion/cycles/unreachable-literal + all fatal (missing/extra/nonexistent/unresolved/ambiguous/symlink/non-regular/escape/forbidden/entry) and no-edge (nonliteral/comment/string) modes. git.mjs uses exactly the two frozen log shapes, first (--reverse) result, git:<sha>, malformed fatal, no-result warn. code.mjs emits all four depends-on endpoint shapes (symbol/file threading, no-export named-import preserved as repository-file->code-symbol), unrepresentable-consumer only for unresolvable, unused/comments/strings emit nothing, dedup. Zero runtime deps, ESM, node:/clotho-relative/permitted-vendor only, spine untouched. Gate green; all required units present and passing. Stakeable.
